scripts.test:rules: cross-env XDG_CONFIG_HOME=node_modules/.cache/karri-firebase-cli FIREBASE_EMULATORS_PATH=node_modules/.cache/firebase/emulators firebase emulators:exec --project demo-karri-mobile --config backend/firebase/firebase.json --only firestore "vitest run --config backend/firebase/tests/vitest.config.ts"
